description: AI-Enhanced Software Engineering plugin for OpenSpec and Compound Engineering workflows.

interface.shortDescription: AI-Enhanced Software Engineering for OpenSpec-driven development.
interface.longDescription: Aisee helps teams run OpenSpec-driven development with structured requirements, schema-aware change authoring, context packs, ID registry, and Compound Engineering handoffs.
